subcategory: 3D WebGL interactive hero with shader background
use_cases: Landing page hero sections for tech products with immersive 3D backgrounds
Portfolio or presentation pages requiring visual impact
Product showcases with interactive WebGL elements
SaaS landing pages seeking modern, animated hero sections
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered hero component featuring a shader-based liquid background that responds to mouse movement and a floating 3D icosahedron monolith with distortion effects. The dark-themed, minimalist design creates an immersive experience ideal for tech landing pages, featuring continuous animations and mouse-reactive elements built with React Three Fiber and custom GLSL shaders.
